channel.title: Posts on Kumaravel Rajan
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Kumaravel Rajan

item.title: I think I understand why Induction proofs work
item.description:
I’ve been dealing with proofs by induction in my coursework. I know how it works. But I never really understood why it worked. I searched a bit online and I think I understand why it works. So here goes -

  1. What it means to prove a logical implication:

    Logical implication looks like §§P \implies Q§§.

    Here, the antecedent is P and consequent is Q.

    The following truth table for implication might seem familiar -
